title: aster morrisonensis
intro: Aster morrisonensis, also known as the Taiwan aster, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family native to Taiwan. It is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antioxidant effects. The plant has been shown to have potential health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving immune function, and protecting against oxidative stress. Aster morrisonensis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or extracts for medicinal use.
